items.name: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
items.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
items.description_zh: SimpleX - 第一个无需任何类型的用户标识符即可运行的消息传递网络 - 设计为 100% 私密！ iOS、Android 和桌面应用程序📱！

items.name: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
items.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
items.description_zh: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。 | AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

items.name: commaai/openpilot
items.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
items.description_zh: openpilot 是一个机器人操作系统。目前，它升级了 300 多辆支持的汽车的驾驶员辅助系统。

items.name: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
items.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.
items.description_zh: CasaOS - 一个简单、易于使用、优雅的开源个人云系统。

items.name: ripienaar/free-for-dev
items.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
items.description_zh: 具有 devops 和 infradev 感兴趣的免费级别的 SaaS、PaaS 和 IaaS 产品列表

items.name: google-labs-code/design.md
items.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
items.description_zh: 用于向编码代理描述视觉标识的格式规范。 DESIGN.md 使代理能够对设计系统有持久的、结构化的理解。

items.name: microsoft/PowerToys
items.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
items.description_zh: Microsoft PowerToys 是一系列实用程序，可提高 Windows 上的工作效率和自定义功能

items.name: hugohe3/ppt-master
items.description: AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He
items.description_zh: AI 从任何文档生成真实的、可编辑的 PowerPoint — 原生形状和动画、以音频旁白形式表达的演讲者注释，以及遵循您自己的 .pptx 模板而不是幻灯片图像的选项 · 作者：Hugo He

items.name: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
items.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
items.description_zh: 使用 AI 编码代理通过一个命令克隆任何网站

items.name: garrytan/gstack
items.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
items.description_zh: 使用 Garry Tan 的精确 Claude Code 设置：23 个固执己见的工具，可充当 CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和 QA

items.name: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
items.description: Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
items.description_zh: AI 视频平台的无限制开源替代方案 — 免费 AI 图像和视频生成工作室，拥有 200 多个模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo）。没有内容过滤器。自托管，麻省理工学院许可。

items.name: topoteretes/cognee
items.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
items.description_zh: Cognee 是面向代理的开源人工智能记忆平台。通过自托管知识图引擎，为您的人工智能代理提供跨会话的持久长期记忆。

items.name: dbt-labs/dbt-core
items.description: dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.
items.description_zh: dbt 使数据分析师和工程师能够使用与软件工程师构建应用程序相同的实践来转换数据。
